prompt: A dark, cinematic survival-horror game inventory screen in Japanese, styled like a realistic modern console UI over a moody nighttime city background. The scene shows a rain-soaked urban intersection with 1 leaning high-rise building in the center background, 1 full moon in a cloudy sky, 1 glowing red traffic light, 1 red neon sign, 1 parked car, 1 vending machine on the far right, and 4 distant human silhouettes including 1 person holding an umbrella. The entire image has a gritty, low-key, bluish-black palette with subtle scanlines, soft bloom, wet reflections, and a tense occult atmosphere. The interface has a top navigation bar with 4 Japanese tabs labeled "所持品", "記録", "資料", "設定", plus 2 shoulder button hints labeled "L1" and "R1". On the left is an inventory grid under the label "重要アイテム" containing 6 visible slots arranged as 3 columns by 2 rows; the top row contains exactly 3 items, each with a small quantity number "1": an old key labeled "古びた鍵", a dented flashlight labeled "歪んだ懐中電灯", and an hourglass labeled "無音の砂時計". The selected slot is the old key, highlighted with a thin neon-magenta border. The bottom row shows 3 empty dark placeholder slots with faint X marks. Beneath the grid is 1 green ECG-like status indicator labeled "正常". In the lower left is an objectives panel labeled "目標" with 1 objective line: "駅前の異変の原因を調査する". In the center-bottom foreground, partially under the UI, place 1 spiral notebook opened to a page with the handwritten Japanese title "鍵の儀式" and 3 short ritual note lines, plus a hand-drawn occult circle symbol. Next to it place 1 beverage can labeled "ゼリ" and 1 small price tag card reading "おすすめ品 ¥298". On the right side, create a large item detail panel for the selected object, with the item name in magenta "古びた鍵" and a category line "分類：重要アイテム". Show a large detailed render of the rusty antique key, iron-like, worn, reddish-brown corrosion, ornate round bow with clover-like openings, and a jagged bit. Below it include 3 short Japanese description lines about it being a ritual-shaped key of unknown purpose, and at the bottom add a quoted note in magenta: "扉は開くべきものではない。閉じるべきものでもない。" followed by "― 書き殴られたメモより". In the lower right corner add 2 control prompts: "✕ 調べる" and "◯ 戻る". Make the composition feel like a polished AAA horror game screenshot, realistic UI, eerie lore-heavy item design, high contrast, subtle neon magenta accents, and a mysterious meaningless-but-plausible occult game logic.
